Bun — A fast all-in-one JavaScript runtime

bun.sh
Bundle, install, and run JavaScript & TypeScript — all in Bun. Bun is a new JavaScript runtime with a native bundler, transpiler, task runner, and npm client built-in.

Bun Runtime - Bun

bun.com/docs/runtime
Execute JavaScript/TypeScript files, package.json scripts, and executable packages with Bun's fast runtime.

Bun (software) - Wikipedia

en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bun_(software)
Bun is a JavaScript runtime, package manager and test runner designed as a drop-in replacement for Node.js. [4][5] Bun uses Safari 's JavaScriptCore as its JavaScript engine, [6] unlike Node.js and Deno, which run on the V8 engine used by Chromium. Bun was originally developed by Jarred Sumner, with its initial release in September 2021.

Bun: The Complete Guide to the All-in-One JavaScript Runtime

www.deployhq.com/guides/bun     2026-02-24T00:00:00.0000000
Bun is an all-in-one JavaScript runtime built from the ground up to be fast. Written in Zig and using JavaScriptCore (the engine powering Safari) instead of V8, Bun combines a runtime, package manager, bundler, and test runner into a single executable.

Bun is a fast JavaScript - rgabc.github.io

rgabc.github.io/bun/
Develop, test, run, and bundle JavaScript & TypeScript projects—all with Bun. Bun is an all-in-one JavaScript runtime & toolkit designed for speed, complete with a bundler, test runner, and Node.js-compatible package manager.

Bun JS: A Modern JavaScript Build Tool - GeeksforGeeks

www.geeksforgeeks.org/javascript/bun-js-a-modern-javascript-build-tool/     2025-07-23T00:00:00.0000000
Bun functions as a JavaScript runtime environment, similar to Node.js. It runs JavaScript code and includes necessary libraries and APIs for developing web apps.

Bun — A fast all-in-one JavaScript runtime - Medium

medium.com/@onix_react/bun-a-fast-all-in-one-javascript-runtime-3eca63a1a02b     2025-10-24T00:00:00.0000000
Bun's key features include a high-performance JavaScript runtime built on JavaScriptCore, an all-in-one toolkit with a built-in package manager, bundler, transpiler, and test runner, and native ...

Why Bun is Rewriting in Rust (And What It Means for JavaScript Developers)

www.cosmicjs.com/blog/bun-rust-rewrite-javascript-runtime     2026-05-19T00:00:00.0000000
Bun's experimental Rust rewrite has reached 99.8% test compatibility on Linux x64. Here's what drove the decision, where it stands today, and what it means for JavaScript developers in 2026.

The Bun Runtime | JSGuides

jsguides.dev/guides/javascript-bun-runtime/     2026-04-21T00:00:00.0000000
Bun is an all-in-one JavaScript runtime with a built-in package manager, bundler, and test runner. Run TypeScript natively and serve HTTP with zero config.
